hotels.name: 2 days Mekong cruise package with Mekong Lover Cruise from Houay Xay to Luang Prabang or Mekong cruise from Luang Prabang to Huay Xai - Thailand
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à Ban Khonkèo, l’établissement 2 days Mekong cruise package with Mekong Lover Cruise from Houay Xay to Luang Prabang or Mekong cruise from Luang Prabang to Huay Xai - Thailand comprend une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite, un jardin, une terrasse et un restaurant.

Certains logements sont pourvus d’un coin salon et/ou d’un balcon.

L’établissement 2 days Mekong cruise package with Mekong Lover Cruise from Houay Xay to Luang Prabang or Mekong cruise from Luang Prabang to Huay Xai - Thailand sert un petit-déjeuner buffet ou américain.

L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport international de Bokeo) est à 51 km.

Les couples apprécient particulièrement l'emplacement de cet établissement. Ils lui donnent la note de 9,6 pour un séjour à deux.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: 2 Days Mekong Cruise Package with Mekong Lover Cruise from Houay Xay to Luang Prabang or Mekong Cruise from Luang Prabang to Huay Xai offers recently renovated rooms with private bathrooms. Each room features air-conditioning, a terrace, balcony, and free WiFi.
Dining and Leisure: Guests can enjoy meals at the on-board restaurant, relax on the sun terrace, or unwind in the hot tub. The bar provides a perfect spot for socialising, while the outdoor seating and picnic areas enhance the cruise experience.
Explore the Region: The cruise departs from Houay Xay and travels to Luang Prabang or vice versa. Along the way, guests can admire the scenic views of the Mekong River and explore local villages, offering a unique cultural experience.
hotels.description_es:
2 days Mekong cruise package with Mekong Lover Cruise from Houay Xay to Luang Prabang or Mekong cruise from Luang Prabang to Huay Xai - Thailand está en Ban Khonkèo y dispone de wifi gratis, jardín, terraza y restaurante.

Algunas unidades tienen zona de estar y/o balcón.

El barco ofrece desayuno buffet o americano.

El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto internacional de Bokeo) está a 51 km.

A las parejas les encanta la ubicación — Le han puesto un 9,6 para viajes de dos personas.

Las distancias en la descripción del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMap©

Algumas unidades têm uma área de estar e/ou varanda.

2 days Mekong cruise package with Mekong Lover Cruise from Houay Xay to Luang Prabang or Mekong cruise from Luang Prabang to Huay Xai - Thailand disponibiliza pequeno-almoço buffet ou americano.

O Aeroporto Internacional de Bokeo fica a 51 km da propriedade.

hotels.description_it:
2 days Mekong cruise package with Mekong Lover Cruise from Houay Xay to Luang Prabang or Mekong cruise from Luang Prabang to Huay Xai - Thailand si trova a Ban Khonkèo e propone WiFi gratuito, giardino, terrazza e ristorante. C’è un parcheggio privato disponibile sul posto.

Alcune unità hanno un’area salotto e/o un balcone.

Questa imbarcazione offre una colazione a buffet o americana.

Aeroporto Internazionale di Bokeo si trova a 51 km dalla struttura.

Le coppie apprezzano molto la posizione: l'hanno valutata 9,6 per un viaggio a due.

hotels.name: Bokeo Lodge & Restaurant
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à Ban Pho Touane, l’établissement 2 étoiles Bokeo Lodge & Restaurant comprend une terrasse, un restaurant et un bar. De nombreux équipements et services sont fournis sur place, notamment une cuisine commune, un centre d'affaires et une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite disponible dans l'ensemble des locaux. Vous pourrez admirer la vue sur le cours d’eau.

Vous profiterez d'une salle de bains privative et de linge de lit.

L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport international de Bokeo) est à 41 km.

Les distances indiquées dans la description de l'établissement sont calculées avec © OpenStreetMap.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Bokeo Lodge & Restaurant in Houayxay offers comfortable rooms with private bathrooms, air-conditioning, and river views. Each room includes a shower and essential amenities for a pleasant stay.
Dining Experience: The family-friendly restaurant serves Indian, Thai, and local cuisines for lunch and dinner. Guests can relax on the terrace or enjoy a drink at the bar, complemented by free WiFi throughout the property.
Convenient Facilities: The hotel features a shared kitchen, daily housekeeping service, business area, and luggage storage. Additional amenities include air-conditioning and a shower, ensuring a comfortable and hassle-free stay.
hotels.description_es:
Bokeo Lodge & Restaurant, en Ban Pho Touane, ofrece alojamiento de 2 estrellas con terraza, restaurante y bar. Este alojamiento ofrece cocina compartida y centro de negocios, además de wifi gratis en todo el alojamiento. Hay vistas al río.

En el hotel, todas las habitaciones están equipadas con baño privado y ropa de cama.

El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto internacional de Bokeo) está a 41 km.

Las distancias en la descripción del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMap©
hotels.description_pt:
Bokeo Lodge & Restaurant localiza-se em Ban Pho Touane e dispõe de acomodações de 2 estrelas com um terraço, um restaurante e um bar. As comodidades deste alojamento incluem uma cozinha partilhada e um centro de negócios, assim como acesso Wi-Fi gratuito em toda a propriedade. Os hóspedes podem desfrutar de vistas do rio.

Os quartos do alojamento dispõem de uma casa de banho privativa e roupa de cama.

O Aeroporto Internacional de Bokeo fica a 41 km de distância.

A distância mencionada na descrição do alojamento é calculada com o © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_it:
Bokeo Lodge & Restaurant si trova a Ban Pho Touane e presenta camere a 2 stelle una terrazza, un ristorante e un bar. Tra i servizi di questa struttura c’è una cucina in comune e un centro business, oltre al WiFi gratuito in tutta la struttura. Gli ospiti possono godersi la vista sul fiume dalla camera.

Le camere di questo hotel dispongono di bagno privato e lenzuola.

Aeroporto Internazionale di Bokeo si trova a 41 km di distanza.

Le distanze nella descrizione della struttura sono calcolate con © OpenStreetMap

hotels.name: Little Hostel
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à Houei Sai, l’établissement Little Hostel possède un jardin, un salon commun, un restaurant et une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite dans l’ensemble de ses locaux.

Les couples apprécient particulièrement l'emplacement de cet établissement. Ils lui donnent la note de 9,8 pour un séjour à deux.

Les distances indiquées dans la description de l'établissement sont calculées avec © OpenStreetMap.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: Little Hostel in Ban Houayxay offers a garden, restaurant, and free WiFi. Guests can relax in the lounge or outdoor seating area.
Convenient Facilities: The hostel features a minimarket, picnic area, and bicycle parking. Air-conditioning and ground-floor units enhance comfort.
Dining Options: The on-site restaurant serves a variety of meals, catering to diverse tastes.
Accessible Location: Located in Ban Houayxay, Laos, Little Hostel is 100 km from Luang Prabang Airport. Reception staff speak English and Thai.
Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 9.8 for a two-person trip.
Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_es:
